title: S. O. C. medium
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9frh","text":"S.O.C. Medium is used in the final step of bacterial cell transformation to obtain maximal transformation efficiency ofE. coli. S.O.C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":119,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Fill the bottle with 400 mL distilled water
Measure 90.08 g Glucose Materials: Glucose Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #G7021
Add distilled water to a total of 500 mL
Filter sterilize with a 0.2 µm filter
Fill the bottle with 950 mL distilled water

Measure 20 g Tryptone, 5 g Yeast extract and 0.5 g Sodium chloride. Add 15 g Agar to create agar plates Materials: Tryptone Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #T9410 Yeast Extract Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #Y0875 Sodium chloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #S9625 Agar Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A1296
Adjust pH to pH 7.0 with concentrated sodium hydroxide Materials: Sodium hydroxide solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #S8263 (CAS: 1310-73-2)
Add distilled water to a total of 1000 mL
Autoclave solution at 121 °C for 00:00:00
Fill the bottle with 100 mL distilled water
Fill the bottle with 200 mL distilled water
Sterilely transfer 98 mL S. O. B. medium to a sterile 100 mL container
Sterilely add 2 mL 1 Molarity (M) Glucose solution
Add distilled water to a total of 250 mL
Measure 4.66 g Potassium chloride Materials: Potassium chloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P3911 (CAS: 7447-40-7)
Autoclave solution at 121 °C for 00:15:00
Autoclave solution at 121 °C for 00:15:00
Add distilled water to a total of 125 mL
Measure 50.825 g Potassium chloride Materials: Magnesium chloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M0250
Add 1 mL Potassium chloride solution ( 250 millimolar (mM) ) and 0.5 mL Magnesium chloride solution ( 2 Molarity (M) )
creator: Andreas Sagen
